title: PvP Smaller HandHelds
description: Smaller handheld items for a cleaner PvP experience. Improves screen visibility and gives more space during combat without changing the vanilla style.
body:
PvP Smaller Handhelds is a simple vanilla-like resource pack that reduces the size of handheld items for better visibility in combat. Perfect for Crystal PvP, Sword PvP, Anchor PvP, and general gameplay. Designed to keep the default Minecraft feel while making your screen look cleaner and less cluttered.

**Features**
- Smaller handheld items
- Better screen visibility
- Vanilla-style design
- Smooth PvP experience
- Works great for mobile and Java PvP
